name: Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual tracking causes cash flow gaps. We streamline manual invoice tracking instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Managing multiple invoices and payments efficiently.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Managing multiple invoices and payments efficiently.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual tracking causes cash flow gaps. We streamline manual invoice tracking instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual tracking of invoices and payments using spreadsheets.

one_liner: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual tracking causes cash flow gaps. We streamline manual invoice tracking instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
